arts.ttl: Napoli Set Sights on Udinese Center-Back to Strengthen Backline
arts.sum: Serie A title hopefuls Napoli have reportedly identified Udinese center-back Oumas Solet as a concrete defensive target for the summer. According to Calciomercato, the 25-year-old has emerged as a viable alternative for Fiorentina's Pietro Comuzzo. The post Napoli Set Sights on Udinese Center-Back to Strengthen Backline appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
